channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Discounted Portable Rocking Chair Highlights Comfort and Potential Health Benefits
item.description: The article highlights a discounted outdoor rocking chair while also exploring the potential health benefits associated with rocking motion. According to referenced government research, regular use of...

item.title: Peter Obi urges government and judiciary to avoid interference as he joins NDC ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Peter Obi, wey be Labour Party presidential candidate for 2023 and former governor of Anambra State, don officially join the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) ahead of the 2027 general elections. Afte...

item.title: Ngatiari and Njeri Top Leaders at NCBA Golf Series Migaa Leg
item.description: Over the weekend, Migaa Golf Club hosted the 10th leg of the 2026 NCBA Golf Series, and the competition was fierce as golfers vied for a spot in the Grand Finale set for November at Karen Country Club...

item.title: Navigating Relationship Challenges After a Difficult Threesome Experience
item.description: This Slate advice column discusses the emotional aftermath of a threesome that went poorly for one partner. The letter writer describes how their boyfriend focused attention on a third participant, le...

item.title: AI May Change Jobs, But Human Work Remains Essential
item.description: Despite widespread fears, AI is unlikely to trigger mass unemployment. While AI can perform tasks quickly and cheaply, it does not replace the human need for relational, experiential, and personalised...

item.title: The enduring appeal of Star Wars films and shows to fans
item.description: Star Wars has captured the imaginations of audiences for nearly half a century, and its influence remains significant today. Fans cite the franchise's rich storytelling, memorable characters, and expa...

item.title: Family of Missing Kindani Teacher Rejects Death Reports; Awaiting DNA Test Results
item.description: The family of Fredrick Gitije, a teacher at Kindani Secondary School, has rejected claims linking his disappearance to a body found in Nyambene Forest. Following the discovery of a decomposing body by...

item.title: Two fatalities and several injuries as car hits pedestrians in Leipzig
item.description: On Monday, a tragic incident occurred in the centre of Leipzig, Germany, where a vehicle drove into a pedestrian area, resulting in the deaths of two people and injuring multiple others. The incident ...

item.title: Government to Reduce FBT Concessions for Electric Vehicles in Upcoming Budget
item.description: The upcoming Australian federal budget will introduce changes to the concessional treatment of electric vehicles (EVs), projected to save the government $1.7 billion over the budget period. Treasurer ...

item.title: GCC States Display Public Unity Amid Internal Differences in Response to Iran
item.description: On April 28, 2026, representatives of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) gathered in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, to present a unified stance against Iran amid ongoing regional conflict. The summit emphasize...

item.title: Extreme Greenland Ice Melt Intensifies with Record Rates Since 1990
item.description: A new study led by the University of Barcelona reveals that Greenland's ice sheet is melting at unprecedented rates, with extreme melt events becoming more frequent, widespread, and intense. Since 199...

item.title: Petrol and diesel prices rise sharply in May amid international oil tensions
item.description: Fuel prices in South Africa are set to increase significantly in May, continuing a trend of rising costs for the second consecutive month. From Wednesday, the retail price of both grades of petrol wil...

item.title: China expresses concern over Philippine jetski activity and flag planting in West Philippine Sea
item.description: China has raised concerns over a recent Philippine activity in the West Philippine Sea, involving a jetski mission and the planting of the Philippine flag. Chinese authorities described these actions ...

item.title: The Importance of Wearing a Helmet While Skateboarding
item.description: Skateboarding is an exciting sport, but it carries the risk of head injuries, making wearing a helmet essential. The brain, a delicate and soft organ about the size of a melon, contains roughly 86 bil...

item.title: KNH Rolls Out Afya Apex System to Replace Paper Records with Fully Digital Operations
item.description: Kenyatta National Hospital (KNH) has kicked off a major transition to a fully digital healthcare system through a platform known as Afya Apex, marking a big step away from paper-based records that hav...

item.title: Arsenal’s Emirates Stadium Renamed for Champions League Games Against Atletico
item.description: Arsenal are set to host Atletico Madrid in the second leg of the Champions League semi-finals on Tuesday, May 5, but fans will notice that the Emirates Stadium will not carry its usual name. This is d...
